headline: Woman's 'Quick TikTok' Turns Into 6-Hour Scroll, She Now Knows Everything About Herbal Teas
summary: 'I didn't plan this,' Amanda said. 'I just wanted a 30-second video.' She now has a tea blog.
fullBody: Amanda opened TikTok for 'a quick scroll.' 6 hours later, she had watched 400 videos about herbal tea. 'I don't even drink tea,' Amanda said. 'But now I'm an expert.' She has started a tea blog called 'Tea Time with Amanda.' She has 47 followers. 'I'm very passionate,' Amanda said. She has bought 12 types of tea. 'I'll drink them eventually,' Amanda said. She has not.
